CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JOHN MUNOZ GUTIERREZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-24-2008 AT 8:30AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (RETURNED UNABLE TO FORWARD/NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED). COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VILLEDENT, MICHELLE LYNNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANGULO, FREDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLEDENT, MICHELLE LYNNE $1,944.77 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,944.77, DEFENDANT JOHN MUNOZ GUTIERREZ DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE 2778.24 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES AND LOSS OF USE, AND ATTRIBUTES 30% COMPARABLE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PREVIOUS PAYMENT TENDERED ON HER BEHALF TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VILLEDENT, MICHELLE LYNNE
